Our Story

A mother-daughter team with a passion for creating unforgettable celebrations

Photo of Carolyn & Gabriella

Meet Carolyn & Gabriella

Events by Ella was born from a simple love of bringing people together. Carolyn Azzariti and her daughter Gabriella started out doing what they loved most — planning parties, showers, and weddings for family and friends.

What began as a hobby quickly became something more. Venues took notice of their eye for detail and their ability to transform any space, and asked to work with them. They jumped at the opportunity.

Today, Events by Ella is a full-service event planning company headquartered on Long Island, New York, serving clients in all 50 states. Everything they do is driven by a belief that celebrations should feel personal, intentional, and beautiful — and that the details matter most.

Nearly everything they create is handmade and crafted in house. From centerpieces to backdrops, every piece of decor is designed and built by their team, giving each event a one-of-a-kind feel that can’t be replicated.

What We Believe In

Handcrafted, Always

We believe in the beauty of handmade. Nearly everything we create is built in house, giving each event a truly personal touch.

Every Detail Matters

From the table settings to the timeline, we obsess over the details so you don’t have to.

Made for You

No two events are alike. We design every celebration from scratch to reflect your story and style.

Let’s Plan Your Next Celebration

Whether it’s an intimate gathering or a grand event, we’d love to bring your vision to life.

Get in Touch
Events by Ella

Handcrafted event planning and custom decor. Based on Long Island, NY — serving all 50 states.
